x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1f
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>VA Catalog Integration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module> <number>CHK0006136</number> <order>110</order> <remediation_guidance>Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1f</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
